name: apple-a-day
description: Agent-native Mac health toolkit for read-only diagnostics, vitals monitoring, and cleanup recommendations.

interface.shortDescription: Check and monitor Mac health from an agent-safe CLI.
interface.longDescription: apple-a-day gives Codex a read-only Mac health surface: checkups, JSON findings, launchd vitals monitoring, profile-aware cleanup recommendations, and install/status commands for durable observability. It is CLI-first and keeps remediation as explicit suggested actions.
defaultPrompt: Use apple-a-day to run a read-only Mac health check.
Use apple-a-day to inspect recent vitals before heavy local work.
Use apple-a-day to install the vitals monitor and verify launchd status.
